summary: Iteration 20: Complete testing of Portfolio Detail Page Enhancements. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend UI elements verified working correctly. The portfolio detail page now shows: (1) Portfolio Rationale & Construction with Investment Thesis, Risk Assessment, Data Quality, (2) Returns & P&L Breakdown with XIRR, unrealized/realized P&L, win rate, (3) Top Gainer and Biggest Loss, (4) Rebalance History with '0 swaps' empty state message.
passed_tests: GET /api/portfolios/xirr/bespoke_forward_looking - returns 200 with xirr_pct, days_held, unrealized_pnl, realized_pnl, win_rate_pct, top_gainer, top_loser
GET /api/portfolios/xirr/quick_entry - returns 200 with valid XIRR data
GET /api/portfolios/xirr/{all_6_portfolios} - all return valid responses (200 or 404 for inactive)
GET /api/portfolios/rebalance-log/bespoke_forward_looking - returns 200 with logs array (empty is valid)
GET /api/portfolios/bespoke_forward_looking - returns holdings array with stock details
Frontend: [data-testid='construction-notes'] visible with Investment Thesis, Risk Assessment, Data Quality
Frontend: [data-testid='xirr-section'] visible with Returns & P&L Breakdown
Frontend: [data-testid='holdings-table'] shows 10 stocks with entry/current prices, P&L%, weight, value, signal
Frontend: [data-testid='sector-allocation'] shows pie chart with 6 sectors
Frontend: 5-Year Backtest section shows Alpha: +24.93%, CAGR: +35.62%
seed_data_creation: None - using existing portfolio data (6 AI-managed portfolios)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified the Portfolio Detail Page Enhancements. Key findings: (1) GET /api/portfolios/xirr/{strategy_type} returns XIRR calculation with xirr_pct, days_held, unrealized_pnl, realized_pnl, win_rate_pct, top_gainer, top_loser. For short holding periods (<7 days), it falls back to simple return. (2) GET /api/portfolios/rebalance-log/{strategy_type} returns logs array (empty for new portfolios). (3) Portfolio detail endpoint returns portfolio_thesis, risk_assessment, data_quality_note from construction_log. (4) Frontend PortfolioDetail.js has ConstructionNotes, XirrSection, RebalanceLog components with proper data-testid attributes. (5) All 6 portfolios (bespoke_forward_looking, quick_entry, long_term, swing, alpha_generator, value_stocks) have active status with XIRR data.
